text.content:
Gangrel

The Ferals

In-Clan Disciplines: Animalism, Fortitude, Protean

Clan Bane

Animal Features. Whenever a Gangrel frenzies, they gain a permanent bestial feature — a patch of fur, a fang that won't retract, claws, a tail nub, slitted pupils, pointed ears, or similar. Each feature reduces one Social Attribute (except Intimidation) by 1, to a minimum of 0. These features are cumulative and cannot be healed by normal means. Fleshcrafting or similar powers can temporarily hide them.

Compulsion

Feral Impulses. The vampire regresses to an animalistic state. They must resolve the current situation through fight or flight — complex plans, negotiation, and technology are beyond them. They must choose: attack the nearest threat or flee the scene entirely. Until they commit to one, they suffer a 2-dice penalty to all Mental and Social rolls.
